recommendations.title: The Ugly Dachshund
recommendations.overview: The Garrisons are the "proud parents" of three adorable dachshund pups - and one overgrown Great Dane named Brutus, who nevertheless thinks of himself as a dainty dachsie. His identity crisis results in an uproarious series of household crises that r

recommendations.title: The Cat from Outer Space
recommendations.overview: A UFO is stranded on earth and impounded by the US government. Its pilot, a cat with a collar that gives it special powers, including the ability to communicate with humans, has eluded the authorities and seeks the help of a scientist in order to rec

recommendations.title: Candleshoe
recommendations.overview: When ex-con artist Harry claims that a secret treasure is hidden inside Candleshoe, an English estate, he creates an elaborate plan to find and steal the prize. By convincing a girl named Casey to impersonate the estate owner's long-lost granddaughte

recommendations.title: The Salvation
recommendations.overview: In 1870s America, a peaceful American settler kills his family's murderer which unleashes the fury of a notorious gang leader. His cowardly fellow townspeople then betray him, forcing him to hunt down the outlaws alone.

recommendations.title: Trinity Is Still My Name
recommendations.overview: The two brothers Trinity and Bambino are exchanged by two federal agents and take advantage of the situation to steal a huge booty hidden in a monastery by a gang of outlaws.

recommendations.title: Big Jake
recommendations.overview: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson.

recommendations.title: The Wild Bunch
recommendations.overview: An aging group of outlaws look for one last big score as the "traditional" American West is disappearing around them.

recommendations.title: High Noon
recommendations.overview: Will Kane, the sheriff of a small town in New Mexico, learns a notorious outlaw he put in jail has been freed, and will be arriving on the noon train. Knowing the outlaw and his gang are coming to kill him, Kane is determined to stand his ground, so

recommendations.title: Trouble
recommendations.overview: A pampered dog named Trouble must learn to live in the real world while trying to escape from his former owner's greedy children and must learn how to survive on the big-city streets.

recommendations.title: Day of the Outlaw
recommendations.overview: Blaise Starrett is a rancher at odds with homesteaders when outlaws hold up the small town. The outlaws are held in check only by their notorious leader, but he is diagnosed with a fatal wound and the town is a powder keg waiting to blow.
